securityNote: Sanitized starter ledger only. Do not store secrets, tokens, database URLs, cookies, runtime state, or exact cloud credentials here.

authoritativeWorkspaceNotes: Local Codex may work on small, explicitly scoped repository documentation and local code tasks.
Local OpenClaw/Maxink supervises task packaging, verification, and handoff decisions.
Hermes may consume handoff records after Maxink/H Sing decide what to sync.
Tencent Cloud OpenClaw is a separate authoritative workspace for cloud-owned tasks.
projects.tencentCloudBoundaryNote: Do not access Tencent Cloud from local Codex unless a future task package explicitly authorizes that access. This sprint did not access Tencent Cloud.
projects.currentChatTaskOwnershipNote: Per sprint 6 clarification, the SingClaw chat task belongs to Tencent Cloud OpenClaw main workspace, not this local Codex continuation.

checks: Optional local validator: npm run validate:codex-ledger

nextHandoff.recommendedAction: Review the Codex loop package, then use docs/codex/task-template.md for the next local task or stop local work when the ledger marks the task cloud-owned.
